name: Pooled Income Fund Gain Exclusion

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must transfer property to a pooled income fund as defined in section 642(c)(5).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes the recognition of gain when property is transferred to a trust in exchange for an interest in other trust property, provided the trust is a qualified pooled income fund.
